title: X 60 Pack All Purpose PET WIPES for daily Cleaning of your Dogs and Cats Deodorizing ALCOHOL FREE and WET Moist Dog Paw Cleaner & Dog Ear Cleaner Wipes Pack (240 Wipes)
features: 【NO WATER NEEDED】All Purpose Moist & Deodorizing wipes that can be used daily on your Dogs and Cats to remove Dirt and Odour
【FAST & EASY TO USE】Each Wipe is approx 20cm X 15cm and dog wipes are supplied in Re-Sealable Soft Packs for easy and convenient use.
【PET ESSENTIALS】These Pet wipes for dogs and cats contains essentials such as Aloe Vera, Tea Tree Oil, Vitamin E, Camomile & Oatmeal. Aloe Vera helps to condition your Pet's Skin and Coat.
【SAFE FOR PETS (above 8 Weeks)】Wipes are Alcohol Free which makes it safer to us on Your Pet's Paws, Nose, Bum, Ear, Body and even for Tears.
【GUARANTEED SATISFACTION】Save more with Multi-Pack Deals as Wipes have to be used daily and it would last longer
description: Product Description Genuine and high quality product. We have carefully selected our products that are quality standard of great value. With us you are always in good hands. Directions Store in a cool and dry place.
